name: Don Quijote Honolulu (Deli / Poke Counter)
tagline: 24 hours, legit poke, fresh bento, spam musubi — the Japanese-style superstore that locals hit at 2am without shame.
mustOrder: Poke by the container — multiple varieties, always fresh and cheap
Spam musubi — perfectly proportioned rice-to-spam ratio
Bento boxes — Japanese-quality prepared meals at supermarket prices
parking: Large free parking structure attached to the store
talkStory: Part of the Japanese Don Quijote discount chain (formerly Daiei), this Kaheka St location became a local institution for its 24-hour deli counter with surprisingly excellent poke and prepared foods. Open 24/7. The late-night poke and bento run is a Honolulu tradition. Poke counter gets restocked throughout the day. The takoyaki and tempura near the deli are sleeper hits.
